g.text: HNSW PERFORMANCE TRADEOFF: efSearch Parameter Space

ol.li: Beam Width: efSearch defines the size of the dynamic candidate list maintained during the greedy traversal of the base layer (Layer 0).
Probability: As ef grows, the probability of reaching the true nearest neighbor increases as the search tracks more local minima.
Complexity: Distance computations scale linearly as $O(ef \times M)$, where $M$ is the number of connections per node.

g.title: High precision target; standard sweet spot
Maximum quality priority; significant latency penalty

ul.li: Backtracking: Sufficient buffer to escape local minima in L0.

g.title: High precision target; standard sweet spot
Maximum quality priority; significant latency penalty
